sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tokens (id UInt32, input_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_tokens VALUES (1, 'abc;123,;xyz!'), (2, 'test#data;example?value'), (3, '  leading spaces;  trailing spaces  ');
SELECT id, tokens(input_string) AS token_array FROM test_tokens WHERE tokens(input_string)[1] <> 'test' AND tokens(input_string)[2] <> '';
SELECT id, tokens(input_string) AS token_array FROM test_tokens WHERE (SELECT count() FROM test_tokens WHERE NOT tokens(input_string) IS NULL) <> (SELECT count() FROM test_tokens);
SELECT id, tokens(input_string) AS token_array FROM test_tokens GROUP BY token_array HAVING length(token_array) <> 3;
SELECT id, tokens('test1,;\\ test2,;\\ test3,;\\   test4') AS token_array WHERE NOT (length(token_array) <> 0 OR id = 2);
SELECT id, count() AS token_count FROM test_tokens WHERE tokens(input_string) <> [] GROUP BY id HAVING count() <> (SELECT count() FROM test_tokens) - 1;
SELECT id, tokens(input_string) AS token_array FROM test_tokens WHERE input_string <> '';
SELECT id, tokens(input_string) AS token_array FROM test_tokens WHERE (SELECT tokens(input_string) FROM test_tokens WHERE id = 3) <> [];
ALTER TABLE test_tokens ADD COLUMN additional_data String DEFAULT 'default';
SELECT id, tokens(COALESCE(input_string, 'default;token')) AS token_array FROM test_tokens WHERE token_array[1] <> 'special' AND token_array[2] IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, tokens(input_string) AS temp_tokens FROM test_tokens WHERE token_array[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT temp.id, count() FROM temp_test temp JOIN test_tokens ON temp.token_array[1] <> tokens(test_tokens.input_string)[1] GROUP BY temp.id HAVING count() > 1;
